# Reference Based Multiple Imputation (`rbmi`)

## Overview

The `rbmi` package is used for the imputation of missing data in
clinical trials with continuous multivariate normal longitudinal
outcomes. It supports imputation under a missing at random (MAR)
assumption, reference-based imputation methods, and delta adjustments
(as required for sensitivity analysis such as tipping point analyses).
The package implements both Bayesian and approximate Bayesian multiple
imputation combined with Rubin’s rules for inference, and frequentist
conditional mean imputation combined with (jackknife or bootstrap)
resampling.

## Installation

The package can be installed directly from CRAN via:

    install.packages("rbmi")

Note that the usage of Bayesian multiple imputation requires the
installation of the suggested package
[rstan](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=rstan).

    install.packages("rstan")

## Usage

The package is designed around its 4 core functions:

- [`draws()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/draws.md) -
  Fits multiple imputation models
- [`impute()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/impute.md) -
  Imputes multiple datasets
- [`analyse()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/analyse.md) -
  Analyses multiple datasets
- [`pool()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool.md) -
  Pools multiple results into a single statistic

The basic usage of these core functions is described in the quickstart
vignette:

    vignette(topic = "quickstart", package = "rbmi")

## Validation

For clarification on the current validation status of `rbmi` please see
the FAQ vignette.

## Support

For any help with regards to using the package or if you find a bug
please create a [GitHub
issue](https://github.com/openpharma/rbmi/issues)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`QR_decomp()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/QR_decomp.md)
  : QR decomposition

- [`STAN_BLOCKS`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/STAN_BLOCKS.md)
  : List of Stan Blocks

- [`Stack`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/Stack.md) : R6
  Class for a FIFO stack

- [`add_class()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/add_class.md)
  : Add a class

- [`adjust_trajectories()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/adjust_trajectories.md)
  : Adjust trajectories due to the intercurrent event (ICE)

- [`adjust_trajectories_single()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/adjust_trajectories_single.md)
  : Adjust trajectory of a subject's outcome due to the intercurrent
  event (ICE)

- [`analyse()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/analyse.md)
  : Analyse Multiple Imputed Datasets

- [`ancova()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/ancova.md) :
  Analysis of Covariance

- [`ancova_single()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/ancova_single.md)
  : Implements an Analysis of Covariance (ANCOVA)

- [`antidepressant_data`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/antidepressant_data.md)
  : Antidepressant trial data

- [`apply_delta()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/apply_delta.md)
  : Applies delta adjustment

- [`as_analysis()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_analysis.md)
  :

  Construct an `analysis` object

- [`as_ascii_table()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_ascii_table.md)
  : as_ascii_table

- [`as_class()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_class.md)
  : Set Class

- [`as_cropped_char()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_cropped_char.md)
  : as_cropped_char

- [`as_dataframe()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_dataframe.md)
  : Convert object to dataframe

- [`as_draws()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_draws.md)
  :

  Creates a `draws` object

- [`as_imputation()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_imputation.md)
  : Create an imputation object

- [`as_indices()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_indices.md)
  : Convert indicator to index

- [`as_mmrm_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_mmrm_df.md)
  : Creates a "MMRM" ready dataset

- [`as_mmrm_formula()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_mmrm_formula.md)
  : Create MMRM formula

- [`as_model_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_model_df.md)
  :

  Expand `data.frame` into a design matrix

- [`as_simple_formula()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_simple_formula.md)
  : Creates a simple formula object from a string

- [`as_stan_array()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_stan_array.md)
  : As array

- [`as_strata()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/as_strata.md)
  : Create vector of Stratas

- [`assert_variables_exist()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/assert_variables_exist.md)
  : Assert that all variables exist within a dataset

- [`char2fct()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/char2fct.md)
  : Convert character variables to factor

- [`check_ESS()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/check_ESS.md)
  : Diagnostics of the MCMC based on ESS

- [`check_hmc_diagn()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/check_hmc_diagn.md)
  : Diagnostics of the MCMC based on HMC-related measures.

- [`check_mcmc()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/check_mcmc.md)
  : Diagnostics of the MCMC

- [`compute_sigma()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/compute_sigma.md)
  : Compute covariance matrix for some reference-based methods (JR, CIR)

- [`control_bayes()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/control.md)
  : Control the computational details of the imputation methods

- [`convert_to_imputation_list_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/convert_to_imputation_list_df.md)
  :

  Convert list of
  [`imputation_list_single()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/imputation_list_single.md)
  objects to an
  [`imputation_list_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/imputation_list_df.md)
  object (i.e. a list of
  [`imputation_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/imputation_df.md)
  objects's)

- [`d_lagscale()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/d_lagscale.md)
  : Calculate delta from a lagged scale coefficient

- [`delta_template()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/delta_template.md)
  :

  Create a delta `data.frame` template

- [`draws()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/draws.md) :
  Fit the base imputation model and get parameter estimates

- [`eval_mmrm()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/eval_mmrm.md)
  : Evaluate a call to mmrm

- [`expand()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/expand.md)
  [`fill_locf()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/expand.md)
  [`expand_locf()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/expand.md)
  :

  Expand and fill in missing `data.frame` rows

- [`extract_covariates()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/extract_covariates.md)
  : Extract Variables from string vector

- [`extract_data_nmar_as_na()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/extract_data_nmar_as_na.md)
  : Set to NA outcome values that would be MNAR if they were missing
  (i.e. which occur after an ICE handled using a reference-based
  imputation strategy)

- [`extract_draws()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/extract_draws.md)
  :

  Extract draws from a `stanfit` object

- [`extract_imputed_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/extract_imputed_df.md)
  : Extract imputed dataset

- [`extract_imputed_dfs()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/extract_imputed_dfs.md)
  : Extract imputed datasets

- [`extract_params()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/extract_params.md)
  : Extract parameters from a MMRM model

- [`fit_mcmc()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/fit_mcmc.md)
  : Fit the base imputation model using a Bayesian approach

- [`fit_mmrm()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/fit_mmrm.md)
  : Fit a MMRM model

- [`format_method_descriptions()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/format_method_descriptions.md)
  : Format method descriptions

- [`generate_data_single()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/generate_data_single.md)
  : Generate data for a single group

- [`getStrategies()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/getStrategies.md)
  : Get imputation strategies

- [`get_ESS()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_ESS.md)
  :

  Extract the Effective Sample Size (ESS) from a `stanfit` object

- [`get_bootstrap_stack()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_bootstrap_stack.md)
  : Creates a stack object populated with bootstrapped samples

- [`get_conditional_parameters()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_conditional_parameters.md)
  : Derive conditional multivariate normal parameters

- [`get_delta_template()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_delta_template.md)
  : Get delta utility variables

- [`get_draws_mle()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_draws_mle.md)
  : Fit the base imputation model on bootstrap samples

- [`get_ests_bmlmi()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_ests_bmlmi.md)
  : Von Hippel and Bartlett pooling of BMLMI method

- [`get_example_data()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_example_data.md)
  : Simulate a realistic example dataset

- [`get_jackknife_stack()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_jackknife_stack.md)
  : Creates a stack object populated with jackknife samples

- [`get_mmrm_sample()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_mmrm_sample.md)
  : Fit MMRM and returns parameter estimates

- [`get_pattern_groups()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_pattern_groups.md)
  : Determine patients missingness group

- [`get_pattern_groups_unique()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_pattern_groups_unique.md)
  : Get Pattern Summary

- [`get_pool_components()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_pool_components.md)
  : Expected Pool Components

- [`get_visit_distribution_parameters()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/get_visit_distribution_parameters.md)
  : Derive visit distribution parameters

- [`has_class()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/has_class.md)
  : Does object have a class ?

- [`ife()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/ife.md) : if
  else

- [`imputation_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/imputation_df.md)
  :

  Create a valid `imputation_df` object

- [`imputation_list_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/imputation_list_df.md)
  : List of imputations_df

- [`imputation_list_single()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/imputation_list_single.md)
  :

  A collection of `imputation_singles()` grouped by a single subjid ID

- [`imputation_single()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/imputation_single.md)
  :

  Create a valid `imputation_single` object

- [`impute()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/impute.md) :
  Create imputed datasets

- [`impute_data_individual()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/impute_data_individual.md)
  : Impute data for a single subject

- [`impute_internal()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/impute_internal.md)
  : Create imputed datasets

- [`impute_outcome()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/impute_outcome.md)
  : Sample outcome value

- [`invert()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/invert.md) :
  invert

- [`invert_indexes()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/invert_indexes.md)
  : Invert and derive indexes

- [`is_absent()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/is_absent.md)
  : Is value absent

- [`is_char_fact()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/is_char_fact.md)
  : Is character or factor

- [`is_char_one()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/is_char_one.md)
  : Is single character

- [`is_in_rbmi_development()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/is_in_rbmi_development.md)
  : Is package in development mode?

- [`is_num_char_fact()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/is_num_char_fact.md)
  : Is character, factor or numeric

- [`locf()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/locf.md) : Last
  Observation Carried Forward

- [`longDataConstructor`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/longDataConstructor.md)
  : R6 Class for Storing / Accessing & Sampling Longitudinal Data

- [`ls_design_equal()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/ls_design.md)
  [`ls_design_counterfactual()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/ls_design.md)
  [`ls_design_proportional()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/ls_design.md)
  : Calculate design vector for the lsmeans

- [`lsmeans()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/lsmeans.md)
  : Least Square Means

- [`make_rbmi_cluster()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/make_rbmi_cluster.md)
  :

  Create a `rbmi` ready cluster

- [`mcse_jackknife()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/mcse_internal.md)
  [`jackknife_se()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/mcse_internal.md)
  [`mcse_combine_all_pars()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/mcse_internal.md)
  : Internal MCSE Computations

- [`method_bayes()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/method.md)
  [`method_approxbayes()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/method.md)
  [`method_condmean()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/method.md)
  [`method_bmlmi()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/method.md)
  : Set the multiple imputation methodology

- [`par_lapply()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/par_lapply.md)
  : Parallelise Lapply

- [`parametric_ci()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/parametric_ci.md)
  : Calculate parametric confidence intervals

- [`pool()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool.md)
  [`as.data.frame(`*`<pool>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool.md)
  [`print(`*`<pool>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool.md)
  [`mcse()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool.md)
  [`as.data.frame(`*`<mcse>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool.md)
  [`print(`*`<mcse>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool.md)
  : Pool analysis results obtained from the imputed datasets

- [`pool_bootstrap_normal()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool_bootstrap_normal.md)
  : Bootstrap Pooling via normal approximation

- [`pool_bootstrap_percentile()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool_bootstrap_percentile.md)
  : Bootstrap Pooling via Percentiles

- [`pool_internal()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pool_internal.md)
  : Internal Pool Methods

- [`prepare_stan_data()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/prepare_stan_data.md)
  : Prepare input data to run the Stan model

- [`print(`*`<analysis>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/print.analysis.md)
  :

  Print `analysis` object

- [`print(`*`<draws>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/print.draws.md)
  :

  Print `draws` object

- [`print(`*`<imputation>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/print.imputation.md)
  :

  Print `imputation` object

- [`progressLogger`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/progressLogger.md)
  : R6 Class for printing current sampling progress

- [`pval_percentile()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/pval_percentile.md)
  : P-value of percentile bootstrap

- [`random_effects_expr()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/random_effects_expr.md)
  : Construct random effects formula

- [`set_options()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/rbmi-settings.md)
  : rbmi settings

- [`record()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/record.md) :
  Capture all Output

- [`recursive_reduce()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/recursive_reduce.md)
  : recursive_reduce

- [`remove_if_all_missing()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/remove_if_all_missing.md)
  : Remove subjects from dataset if they have no observed values

- [`rubin_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/rubin_df.md)
  : Barnard and Rubin degrees of freedom adjustment

- [`rubin_rules()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/rubin_rules.md)
  : Combine estimates using Rubin's rules

- [`sample_ids()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/sample_ids.md)
  : Sample Patient Ids

- [`sample_list()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/sample_list.md)
  :

  Create and validate a `sample_list` object

- [`sample_mvnorm()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/sample_mvnorm.md)
  : Sample random values from the multivariate normal distribution

- [`sample_single()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/sample_single.md)
  :

  Create object of `sample_single` class

- [`scalerConstructor`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/scalerConstructor.md)
  : R6 Class for scaling (and un-scaling) design matrices

- [`set_simul_pars()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/set_simul_pars.md)
  : Set simulation parameters of a study group.

- [`set_vars()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/set_vars.md)
  : Set key variables

- [`simulate_data()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/simulate_data.md)
  : Generate data

- [`simulate_dropout()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/simulate_dropout.md)
  : Simulate drop-out

- [`simulate_ice()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/simulate_ice.md)
  : Simulate intercurrent event

- [`simulate_test_data()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/simulate_test_data.md)
  [`as_vcov()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/simulate_test_data.md)
  : Create simulated datasets

- [`sort_by()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/sort_by.md)
  :

  Sort `data.frame`

- [`split_dim()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/split_dim.md)
  : Transform array into list of arrays

- [`split_imputations()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/split_imputations.md)
  :

  Split a flat list of
  [`imputation_single()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/imputation_single.md)
  into multiple
  [`imputation_df()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/imputation_df.md)'s
  by ID

- [`str_contains()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/str_contains.md)
  : Does a string contain a substring

- [`strategy_MAR()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/strategies.md)
  [`strategy_JR()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/strategies.md)
  [`strategy_CR()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/strategies.md)
  [`strategy_CIR()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/strategies.md)
  [`strategy_LMCF()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/strategies.md)
  : Strategies

- [`string_pad()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/string_pad.md)
  : string_pad

- [`transpose_imputations()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/transpose_imputations.md)
  : Transpose imputations

- [`transpose_results()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/transpose_results.md)
  : Transpose results object

- [`transpose_samples()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/transpose_samples.md)
  : Transpose samples

- [`validate()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.md)
  : Generic validation method

- [`validate(`*`<analysis>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.analysis.md)
  :

  Validate `analysis` objects

- [`validate(`*`<draws>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.draws.md)
  :

  Validate `draws` object

- [`validate(`*`<is_mar>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.is_mar.md)
  :

  Validate `is_mar` for a given subject

- [`validate(`*`<ivars>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.ivars.md)
  :

  Validate inputs for `vars`

- [`validate(`*`<references>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.references.md)
  : Validate user supplied references

- [`validate(`*`<sample_list>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.sample_list.md)
  :

  Validate `sample_list` object

- [`validate(`*`<sample_single>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.sample_single.md)
  :

  Validate `sample_single` object

- [`validate(`*`<simul_pars>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.simul_pars.md)
  :

  Validate a `simul_pars` object

- [`validate(`*`<stan_data>`*`)`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate.stan_data.md)
  :

  Validate a `stan_data` object

- [`validate_analyse_pars()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate_analyse_pars.md)
  : Validate analysis results

- [`validate_datalong()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate_datalong.md)
  [`validate_datalong_varExists()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate_datalong.md)
  [`validate_datalong_types()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate_datalong.md)
  [`validate_datalong_notMissing()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate_datalong.md)
  [`validate_datalong_complete()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate_datalong.md)
  [`validate_datalong_unifromStrata()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate_datalong.md)
  [`validate_dataice()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate_datalong.md)
  : Validate a longdata object

- [`validate_strategies()`](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/reference/validate_strategies.md)
  : Validate user specified strategies

# Articles

### Articles

- [rbmi:
  Quickstart](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/articles/quickstart.md):
- [rbmi: Statistical
  Specifications](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/articles/stat_specs.md):
- [rbmi: Advanced
  Functionality](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/articles/advanced.md):
- [rbmi: Implementation of retrieved-dropout models using
  rbmi](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/articles/retrieved_dropout.md):
- [rbmi: Inference with Conditional Mean
  Imputation](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/articles/CondMean_Inference.md):
- [rbmi: Frequently Asked
  Questions](https://openpharma.github.io/rbmi/articles/FAQ.md):
